notes: Example only. Keep real validation logs private and anonymized; do not commit names, emails, phone numbers, private hostnames, IPs, raw screenshots, transcripts, or customer-owned artifacts.

interviews.current_workflow: Scanner, KEV review, SBOM notes, spreadsheet prioritization, manual leadership briefing.
interviews.recent_painful_event: Had to justify edge software remediation order after a high-profile vulnerability disclosure.
interviews.status_quo_gap: Tools ranked findings but did not produce a defensible evidence packet for leadership and SOC handoff.
interviews.desired_output: A short evidence packet with source basis, affected product-family context, recommended first action, and ticket/SIEM review templates.
objections: Needs to see how policy and data boundaries work.
interviews.next_step: Send pilot scope and evidence sample.
